# Project Name

A short tagline.

## Features

- Renders GitHub-Flavoured Markdown
- Supports mermaid diagrams
- Works offline

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://example.com/project.git
cd project
flutter pub get
```

## Usage

Open a `.md` file from the library and scroll.

| Column A | Column B |
|----------|----------|
| a1       | b1       |
| a2       | b2       |
